name: John's Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly add the sugar to the egg yolks and beat until very stiff and white.
2. Beat the egg whites until stiff.
3. Stir the bourbon into the yolk mixture.
4. Mix in the whites and cream with a wire whisk.
5. Chill until served. This is better on the second day.
6. Add a sprinkle of nutmeg to each serving.
